---
title: "Enhanced stability of spinel LiMn1.5Ni0.5O4 with V doping for high-voltage Li-ion batteries in organic and ionic liquid electrolytes"
author: ["Héctor D. Agudelo", "Ferley A. Vasquez", "Jorge A. Calderón", "Roberto M. Torresi", "Eduardo Carmine", "Bikram Kumar Das", "Henry A. Cortés", "Mauricio Rincón Bonilla", "Elena Akhmatskaya"]
date: 2025-08-14
publication: "Journal of Alloys and Compounds, **1039**, 183060 (2025)."
categories: ["Li-ion"]
url_source: https://doi.org/10.1016/j.jallcom.2025.183060
url_preprint:
journ: "Journal of Alloys and Compounds"
issue: 1039
page: 183060
year: 2025
image: featured.png
pub_number: 14
---
